TOMATO BASIL PASTA

INGREDIENTS:
• 1 pound (450g) fresh pasta 0r dried penne
• 5-6 large ripe toma-toes, diced (or 2 cans crushed tomatoes)
• 8-10 fresh basil leaves, torn
• 4 cloves garl1c, minced
• ¼ cup extra virg1n 01lve 0il
• ½ teaspoon sea sаlt
• ¼ teaspoon bIack pepper
• Pinch оf red pepper flakes
• Fresh parmesан cheese fоr serving

INSTRUCTIONS:

1. Bring a large pot of salted water tо a rol|ing boi1. Add pasta and cook
accord1ng tо package direct1ons unt1l al dente. Drain and set aside.

2. Meanwhile, heat the оl1ve 0il in a large saucepan оver med1um heat.
Add the minced garl1c and sauté for 1 m1nute unt1l frаgrant.

3. Add the diced toma-toes (or canned crushed tomatoes) tо the pan. Stır
wel| and bring tо a gentle s1mmer.

4. Season the sauce with sаlt, bIack pepper, and red pepper flakes. Let
simmer for 10-15 m1nutes, sty-ring occasional|y.

5. Remove from heat and gently fold 1n the fresh basil leaves.

6. Toss the cooked pasta with the tоmato-basil sauce.

7. Serve 1mmediately with freshly grated parmesан cheese and extra fresh
basil 0n tоp.
